name: Black Bear

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The hawk has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hawk’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn’t have the Incapacitated condition.

text:
# Black Bear

*Small Beast, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Beak.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage if the target is Bloodied.
